answers: Chemistry = study of matter, its properties, composition, and how substances interact and change. The central science.
Basics: atoms, elements, compounds, reactions, bonding (ionic, covalent), acids/bases, and the periodic table.
Branches: organic (carbon compounds), inorganic (metals), physical (energy/reactions), analytical (measurement), biochemistry.
Learn chemistry: start with the periodic table, understand electron configuration, then chemical bonding and reactions.
